title: I/O Handler Read/Write Pipeline
description: Polymorphic file format handling via a unified load/dump API. The easy_io.load() and easy_io.dump() top-level functions dispatch to format-specific handlers registered in file_handlers dict.
load_pipeline: 1. Receive file (str path, Path, or file-like) + optional file_format
2. Infer file_format from extension if not given (file.split('.')[-1].lower())
3. [GUARD] Raise TypeError if format not in file_handlers registry
dump_pipeline: 2. Infer file_format from file extension if not given; raise ValueError if file is None and no format
3. [GUARD] Raise TypeError if format not in file_handlers registry
YES → return handler.dump_to_str(obj) [serialize to string/bytes, no I/O]
YES → StringIO() → handler.dump_to_fileobj(obj, f) → file_backend.put_text(f.getvalue(), file)
YES → file_backend.fast_put(f, file) [if supported, else fallback]

handler_registry.registration: Dict file_handlers in registry_utils.py; populated at module load time

concrete_methods: dump_to_path(obj, filepath, mode='w') → open(filepath, mode) → dump_to_fileobj(obj, f)

handler_details.helper: set_default() converts set/range/np.ndarray/np.generic to JSON-serializable types

handler_details.load_from_fileobj: file.seek(0) → imageio.get_reader(file, format='mp4') → iterate frames → [optional cv2 grayscale] → np.array(frames), meta_data
handler_details.dump_to_fileobj: [if Tensor] obj.cpu().numpy() → imageio.mimsave(file, obj, format='mp4', fps=17, quality=5, macro_block_size=1, ffmpeg_params)
handler_details.note: imageio import is optional; cv2 imported inline for grayscale mode

key_relationships: BaseFileHandler is abstract parent of ALL handlers (JsonHandler, YamlHandler, PickleHandler, NumpyHandler, TorchHandler, TarHandler, ImageioVideoHandler, GzipHandler, JsonlHandler, CsvHandler, PandasHandler, PILHandler, TorchJitHandler, TxtHandler)
easy_io.load/dump depend_on FileClient (legacy, via file_client_args, deprecated)
str_like flag controls StringIO vs BytesIO wrapping at the load/dump level
NumpyHandler.load_from_path and PickleHandler.load_from_path override to force mode='rb'
NumpyHandler.dump_to_path overrides to force mode='wb' (bypasses base)
branching_conditions: file_format in file_handlers → proceed vs raise TypeError
file is str path vs file-like object vs None
fast_backend=True → use fast_get/fast_put if backend supports it, else fallback
file_client_args vs backend_args (mutually exclusive; file_client_args deprecated)
enable_singleton=True → reuse backend instances keyed by prefix:backend_args
ImageioVideoHandler load: mode='gray' → cv2 grayscale conversion + np.expand_dims
ImageioVideoHandler dump: isinstance(obj, torch.Tensor) → convert to numpy first
